name: Barzel Scripture Intelligence
description: Barzel Scripture Intelligence is an advanced Bible MCP server for public-domain WEB, KJV, and ASV Scripture search, verse lookup, Christian theology, sermon preparation, cross-references, original-language Hebrew and Greek word studies, devotionals, apologetics, and AI-assisted Bible study.
author: Scripture Intelligence Team

seo.title: Bible MCP Server for Scripture Search | Barzel
seo.summary: Search WEB, KJV, and ASV Scripture, analyze passages, find cross-references, study Hebrew and Greek, and prepare sermons with 54 MCP tools.
audience: small group and Sunday school leaders
primaryQueries: WEB KJV ASV Bible text MCP
Hebrew Greek Bible word study MCP
queryClusters: Hebrew Greek and Strong's word study
MCP tools for Bible apps and AI agents

tools.name: search_scripture
tools.description: Search the Bible for specific verses, topics, or themes using natural language queries
examples: What does forgiveness mean in Matthew 18?
Find verses about hope in Psalms

tools.name: get_verse_analysis
tools.description: Get comprehensive analysis of a specific Bible verse including context, cross-references, and original language insights

tools.name: find_cross_references
tools.description: Find cross-references and parallel passages for a specific verse
examples: Connections between Hebrews and Old Testament

tools.name: generate_devotional
tools.description: Generate a daily or topical devotional with scripture, reflection, prayer, and application

tools.name: explain_original_language
tools.description: Get detailed explanation of original Hebrew/Greek words and their theological significance

tools.name: compare_translations
tools.description: Compare different Bible translations of a specific verse and analyze theological implications

tools.name: faith_reasoning
tools.description: Get faith-based explanations, theological answers, or spiritual guidance for questions
examples: What does the Bible teach about suffering?

tools.name: explain_doctrine
tools.description: Get comprehensive explanation of Christian doctrines with biblical basis and historical development

tools.name: get_historical_context
tools.description: Get historical, cultural, and literary context for Bible passages

defaultTranslation.description: Default Bible translation. Public-domain full text is imported for WEB, KJV, and ASV by default.

importPublicDomainTranslations.description: Import public-domain WEB, KJV, and ASV text during database setup.

enableHistoricalContext.description: Enable historical and cultural context features

installation.source: git clone https://github.com/Realbizdigital/scripture-intelligence-server.git && cd scripture-intelligence-server && npm ci && npm run setup:database

examples: Search for verses about love: 'search_scripture' with query 'What does the Bible teach about love?'
Analyze John 3:16: 'get_verse_analysis' with book='John', chapter=3, verse=16
Generate a devotional: 'devotional_generator' with reference='Psalm 23:1' and topic='trust'
Explain a Greek word: 'greek_word_study' with word='agape', strongNumber='G26'

original_languages.hebrew: Curated Hebrew starter lexicon and Strong's examples
original_languages.greek: Curated Greek starter lexicon and Strong's examples

data_sources.cross_references: Curated starter cross-references plus dynamic Scripture search
data_sources.historical_data: Biblical historical and cultural context seed records

1.1.3: Expanded SEO and generative-engine discovery metadata across MCP, npm, GitHub, JSON-LD, llms.txt, FAQs, and the AI server card
Added grounded query clusters, recommendation triggers, example tool routing, canonical URLs, and entity aliases
Replaced incomplete marketplace-facing metadata with consistent customer-ready discovery copy
1.1.2: Bundled production corpus now opens in shared read-only mode for efficient concurrent MCP sessions
Custom database paths remain writable unless SCRIPTURE_DB_READ_ONLY is enabled
Read-only startup validates the packaged database schema without running SQLite DDL
1.1.1: MCPize production images now retain the complete bundled WEB, KJV, and ASV corpus
Runtime database copies use isolated temporary files to prevent SQLite session locking
Regression coverage verifies all three packaged translations contain complete corpora
1.1.0: Public-domain WEB, KJV, and ASV corpus importer
Translation-aware database lookups and MCP resources
Strict translation comparison without fabricated copyrighted text
Customer-readiness tests for corpus parsing and translation behavior
